name: NexGen Energy Ltd.
description: NexGen Energy Ltd. is a Canadian-based corporation focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of uranium projects in the Athabasca Basin of Saskatchewan. The company's flagship asset is the 100%-owned Rook I Project, which hosts the Arrow Deposit, one of the largest and highest-grade undeveloped uranium deposits in the world. NexGen is committed to delivering clean energy fuel for the future while maintaining the highest standards of environmental stewardship and community engagement. Through its disciplined approach to development, the company aims to become a leading low-cost producer in the global uranium market.
